overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a cowboy character walking along a foggy, wet residential street in a historic town. The character passes an elderly pedestrian and walks through an ornate iron gate while a horse-drawn carriage appears in the distance.

wet muddy road surface with visible puddles reflecting the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy residential sidewalk beside a tall stone wall. An elderly woman in period clothing walks alongside before falling behind. The wet muddy road stretches ahead lined with wooden telegraph poles, while evergreen trees loom behind the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion entrance with ornate iron gate

events.description: character walks through the ornate iron gate entrance into the mansion grounds

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the iron gate threshold into the property

imposing multi-story stone mansion with balconies and lit windows visible behind the gate
substantial stone pillars flanking the iron gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an ornate iron gate entrance. Passing through the threshold between stone pillars, a large Victorian mansion becomes visible behind the wall. The fog persists as the character enters the mansion grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with mansion grounds and approaching carriage

events.description: horse-drawn carriage becomes visible approaching in the distance down the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the mansion entrance with the building now visible behind the wall

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the muddy road toward the camera

entered.detail: dark wooden carriage pulled by two horses approaching from the foggy distance
black ornate street lamp post with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: Walking past the mansion entrance, the iron gate falls behind while the Victorian mansion becomes more prominent on the left. A horse-drawn carriage emerges from the fog in the distance, moving along the muddy road toward the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy residential street that gradually opens up to reveal a grand Victorian estate. It begins beside a tall stone wall and evergreen trees, following a character as an elderly woman in period clothing walks alongside them before falling behind on the wet, muddy road. As the character advances past wooden telegraph poles, the camera approaches and passes through an ornate iron gate between stone pillars. The scene then expands to reveal a large Victorian mansion looming on the left as the gate recedes into the background. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the distance where a horse-drawn carriage emerges from the persisting fog and moves along the muddy path toward the character.
